searchDocs.title: abbreviate​
searchDocs.content: </> MathUtils.abbreviate(number: number) → string Abbreviates a number with a suffix. local number = 6969 local abbreviated = abbreviate(number) print(abbreviated) -- 6.69K

searchDocs.title: expand​
searchDocs.content: </> MathUtils.expand(abbreviated: string) → number Expands an abbreviated number to it's literal value. local abbreviated = "6.69K" local number = expand(abbreviated) print(number) -- 6969

searchDocs.title: formatCurrency​
searchDocs.content: </> MathUtils.formatCurrency(number: number) → string Formats a number as currency with commas. local number = 6969 local formatted = formatCurrency(number) print(formatted) -- 6,969

searchDocs.title: formatTime​
searchDocs.content: </> MathUtils.formatTime( seconds: number, format: ("Compact" | "Extended")? ) → string Formats a number of seconds into a time string. local seconds = 6969 local compact = formatTime(seconds) local extended = formatTime(seconds, "Extended") print(compact) -- 01:56:09 print(extended) -- 1h 56m 9s

searchDocs.title: round​
searchDocs.content: </> MathUtils.round( number: number, decimals: number ) → number Rounds a number to the given number of decimal places. local number = 69.696 local rounded = round(number, 2) print(rounded) -- 69.69
